scripts.install:all: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.vercel-build: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:client: cd client && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build
scripts.build: cd client && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.hostinger:build: cd client && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build:hostinger
scripts.hostinger:setup: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src='.env.hostinger';const dst='.env';if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('Copied .env.hostinger to .env');}const src2='server/.env.hostinger';const dst2='server/.env';if(fs.existsSync(src2)){fs.copyFileSync(src2,dst2);console.log('Copied server/.env.hostinger to server/.env');}"
scripts.hostinger:deploy: npm run hostinger:setup && npm run hostinger:build && npm run hostinger:start
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:schema && npm run db:seed
